name: visualize
description: Diagram-rendering canvas. Claude draws via D2 / raw SVG / image URLs; operator riffs on a tldraw surface. Requires `bun` and `d2` on PATH.

bind_host.title: Bind host
bind_host.description: Interface the canvas HTTP server binds to. Default 127.0.0.1 (loopback only). Set to 0.0.0.0 in container environments so the host machine can reach the server.

advertised_host.title: Advertised host
advertised_host.description: Hostname used in the URL given to Claude and shown to the operator. Defaults to the bind host (except 0.0.0.0, which falls back to 127.0.0.1). In containers, set to the host-reachable name (e.g. visualize.orb.local).
